a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Carbon intensity: CO₂ emissions per dollar of GDP, 2022

Kilograms of CO₂ emitted per dollar of GDP.
Fossil fuel and industry emissions
are included. Land-use change
emissions are not included. GDP data is adjusted for inflation and differences in living costs between countries.
Data source: Global Carbon Budget (2024); Bolt and van Zanden - Maddison Project Database 2023

Note: GDP data is expressed in
international-$
at 2011 prices.
